name: FileSlcWriteOptions
summary: Options used when writing a SLC file

constructors.name: FileSlcWriteOptions
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FileSlcWriteOptions class

properties.name: AngleBetweenSegmentsDegrees
properties.summary: The angle that determines how smooth the polylines of the slice curves will be. When the number is small you will get a smooth final output but it will take more time to export and a larger file.

properties.name: SliceDistance
properties.summary: The distance between the slices or layers of curves that your final output will contain. The distance should be based on the slice thickness of your final output device

properties.name: UseMeshes
properties.summary: Use meshes to generate slices. The curves for each slice are generated by intersecting the object mesh with a plane. the Angle between polyline segments data is not used when this value is true
